summary: Discussion signals highlight Claude Code vs OpenCode token overhead, emerging MCP ecosystem, sandboxing for agent safety, and user workflow friction with coding agents. | Official vendor signals: JetBrains benchmark, Anthropic containment & Claude Code story, Mistral Vibe/Studio, Daytona funding & sandbox features, OpenAI GPT-5.6, Google ADK 2.0 & Gemma 4, Vercel integrations, Supabase funding, E2B funding, Fly.io Sprites MCP, and research papers. User workflow field reports absent. | Screened 130 github-oss items for agent ecosystem signals. Strong mainstream product releases from Anthropic, OpenAI, Qwen, Zed, Google, Cline, and others dominate. Infra primitives around memory (prism-coder, membridge) and security (hol-guard, aguara) show traction. Missing user_workflow field reports (no social/discussion sources in this shard). | Package ecosystem signals show growing agent infrastructure: memory systems, sandboxes, MCP bridges, eval tools, and detection libraries. Leading vendors (OpenAI, GitHub) continue releasing CLI updates. User workflow gaps remain in this shard.

candidates.title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens overhead vs OpenCode 7k
candidates.why_it_matters: Measured 4.7x token overhead impacts cost and latency for users.
